overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character navigating a snowy, industrial stone village. The character walks through narrow alleys, squeezes through rock crevices, climbs vertical surfaces, and explores elevated industrial platforms in a winter environment with overcast lighting.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow snowy alley between historic stone buildings

entered.detail: tall stone wall with weathered texture and small windows
stone facade with wooden door and metal ring handle
long icicles hanging from roof edges
snow-covered cobblestone path
dark wooden door with metal ring handle
vertical window emitting warm orange light

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow snowy alley between tall stone buildings. Icicles hang from the roofs above, and warm light glows from a window on the left. The ground is covered in snow, and metal pipes run along the stone walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: tight rock crevice between stone walls

events.description: enters narrow rock crevice between stone walls

agents.ego_description: squeezing through narrow rock passage and climbing up rocky terrain

entered.detail: rough rock walls forming a tight passage
window with metal bars and grid pattern
stone archway leading to upper area

segments.scene_description: The character squeezes through a tight rock crevice between stone walls, transitioning from the alley to a more confined space. A metal barred window appears on the left as the character begins climbing up the rocky terrain toward a stone archway.

events.description: emerges from rock crevice into open rocky climb
text overlay 'GIBSON BAUM DISTRICT' appears on screen

agents.ego_description: climbing up icy rock face toward industrial structures

entered.detail: large metal pipes and industrial machinery attached to wall
vertical cliff covered in ice and snow
metal walkway with railings at top of climb
wooden support beams and scaffolding

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the crevice, the character climbs up an exposed rocky face with ice formations. Industrial metal structures and scaffolding become visible as the character ascends toward a metal platform. The text 'GIBSON BAUM DISTRICT' appears on screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial rooftop platform with metal railings

events.description: character crouches and takes cover behind metal utility box
stands up and continues moving forward

agents.ego_description: cautiously moving across industrial platform, briefly taking cover behind equipment before continuing

entered.detail: large rectangular metal equipment box
metal safety railing along platform edge
distant snow-covered mountain peaks
tall industrial structure with antenna

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the top and explores an open industrial platform with metal railings. Distant snowy mountains and industrial towers are visible. The character briefly crouches behind a metal utility box before standing and continuing across the platform.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky descent path with metal structures

events.description: jumps down from platform and begins descending rocky path

agents.ego_description: climbing down from industrial platform through rocky terrain

entered.detail: steep rocky path with loose stones
circular metal grate covering window opening
wooden roof with snow covering

segments.scene_description: The character descends from the industrial platform, jumping down onto a rocky path. Metal grate windows and wooden roof structures become visible as the character moves downward through the terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone corridor with metal grates

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow lower passages with metal grate windows

entered.detail: tight passage between high stone walls
stone steps leading upward
tall vertical pipes running up wall

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow stone corridor with metal grate windows on the right. Stone stairs appear ahead, and vertical metal pipes run along the left wall. The space is more enclosed and darker than the previous areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone alley with vertical pipes and archway entrance

events.description: begins climbing up wall using metal pipes

agents.ego_description: walking through alley and climbing up stone wall with metal pipes toward archway

entered.detail: large stone archway leading to dark interior
metal ladder attached to stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a stone archway and begins climbing up the wall using metal pipes and a ladder. The scene transitions from the narrow corridor to a climbing sequence leading toward the dark archway entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a narrow snowy village alley, ascending through industrial heights before descending back into a dark, enclosed stone corridor. It begins by moving past stone buildings with hanging icicles and glowing windows, then tightens as the camera squeezes through a rock crevice and climbs an icy face toward a metal platform. As the character reaches the summit of the Gibson Baum District, the view expands across an open industrial terrace overlooking distant snowy mountains and towers. The scene then shifts downward as the character jumps from the platform onto a rocky path, passing wooden roofs and metal grates. Finally, the environment closes in again, moving through a dim stone corridor with vertical pipes before climbing a ladder toward a dark archway entrance.
